BASE_URL.description: Public URL of your Plausible instance (e.g., https://plausible.yourdomain.com). No trailing slash.

SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: 64-byte random string for cookie signing and secrets. Auto-generated.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string. Add a Railway Postgres service to auto-inject.

CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE_URL.description: ClickHouse connection string. Default works with Railway's ClickHouse add-on as a companion service named 'clickhouse'.

DISABLE_REGISTRATION.description: Set to true to disable public registration after creating your admin account.

ENABLE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION.description: Set to true to require email verification for new users.
